name: PocketBase admin bootstrap behavior
pocketBaseNote: PocketBase admin bootstrap flows allow the first superuser setup, then require a superuser token for collection metadata, scaffolds, exports, and admin record browsing.

cases.name: superusers collection can be created before bootstrap
cases.pocketBaseNote: Before any superuser exists, bootstrap code can create the _superusers auth collection.

cases.name: first superuser record can bootstrap without token
cases.pocketBaseNote: The first superuser record can be created without an existing admin token.

cases.name: second superuser create without token is rejected
cases.pocketBaseNote: After bootstrap, creating more superusers requires an authenticated superuser token.

cases.name: admin collection list is guarded after bootstrap
cases.pocketBaseNote: Collection metadata APIs become superuser-only after the first superuser exists.

cases.name: superuser password auth returns an admin token
cases.pocketBaseNote: The admin login flow returns a bearer token tied to the _superusers collection.

cases.name: superuser token can list collection metadata
cases.pocketBaseNote: A valid superuser token can access collection metadata needed by the admin UI.

cases.name: superuser auth methods are available for login UI
cases.pocketBaseNote: The admin login UI can discover enabled _superusers auth methods.

cases.name: superuser token can read collection scaffolds
cases.pocketBaseNote: The admin UI can fetch base/auth/view collection scaffolds after login.

cases.name: normal auth token cannot access admin metadata
cases.pocketBaseNote: A normal auth collection token must not satisfy superuser-only admin metadata guards.

cases.name: superuser token can create collection metadata
cases.pocketBaseNote: A superuser can create collection metadata from the admin UI.

cases.name: superuser token bypasses protected record rules
cases.pocketBaseNote: Superuser tokens bypass record rules so the admin record browser can manage protected records.

cases.name: superuser token can export admin metadata
cases.pocketBaseNote: A superuser can export collection metadata for backups or import/export workflows.
